calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-15-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Anthony Vaughn.
Thomas Litton, Esq. for Plaintiff: Rini Keagy.
Order waiving appearance of witness is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and declarations in support, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Elain Martin as follows:
Damages $16,510.88
Costs $321.00 for a total of $16,831.88
Judgment signed in open court.
